hooks.command: input=$(cat); echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); exit(0 if 'git commit' in d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command','') else 1)" && echo '{"systemMessage": "Pre-commit : /Tests (tests unitaires) · /Docs (documentation feature)"}' || true

input=$(cat); echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); exit(0 if 'git push' in d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command','') else 1)" && echo '{"systemMessage": "Rappel : lancer /Security avant de pusher en prod"}' || true
